queries.question: Where is the address and city of the marketing office?
queries.sql: SELECT Office_Address, City FROM Office JOIN Job_Posting On Job_Posting.Office_ID = Office.ID JOIN Department ON Job_Posting.Departments_ID =Department.ID WHERE Department.Name="Marketing"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?office_address ?city WHERE {
  ?office a :Office .
  ?job_posting a :JobPostings .
  ?job_posting p:hasOffice ?office .
  ?department a :Departments .
  ?job_posting p:hasDepartment ?department .
  ?office p:Office_Address ?office_address .
  ?office p:City ?city .
  ?department p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Marketing")
}

queries.question: Tell me the office address and city of the job with the lowest salary and that job.
queries.sql: SELECT Title, Office_Address, City FROM Office JOIN Job_Posting On Job_Posting.Office_ID = Office.ID ORDER BY Salary ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?office_address ?city WHERE {
  ?office a :Office .
  ?job_posting a :JobPostings .
  ?job_posting p:hasOffice ?office .
  ?job_posting p:Title ?title .
  ?office p:Office_Address ?office_address .
  ?office p:City ?city .
  ?job_posting p:Salary ?salary_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?salary_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Where is the marketing office located?
Tell me the job with the lowest salary and where it is located.
